<style id='block-visibility-screen-size-styles-inline-css'>
/* Large screens (desktops, 992px and up) */
@media ( min-width: 992px ) {
	.block-visibility-hide-large-screen {
		display: none !important;
	}
}

/* Medium screens (tablets, between 768px and 992px) */
@media ( min-width: 768px ) and ( max-width: 991.98px ) {
	.block-visibility-hide-medium-screen {
		display: none !important;
	}
}

/* Small screens (mobile devices, less than 768px) */
@media ( max-width: 767.98px ) {
	.block-visibility-hide-small-screen {
		display: none !important;
	}
}
/*# sourceURL=block-visibility-screen-size-styles-inline-css */
</style>

}

.wfea-card__venue_name {
  font-family: 'Lato';
  font-weight: 700;
}

.eaw-time {
  width: 200px! important;
}

/* Custom carousel navigation button styles */
.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-prev,
.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-next {
  color: inherit;
}
.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-prev {
  left: -40px !important;
}
.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-next {
  right: -40px !important;
}

:root {
  --wp--custom--carousel-block--navigation-color: white;
}

.align-content-center{
align-content:center;}

@media (max-width: 345px) {
.footer-copyright p {
font-size:10px;
}
}

@media (max-width: 600px) {

.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-prev {
  left: -20px !important;
}
.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-next {
  right: -20px !important;
}

.ghub-query-slider .ghub-slider-container .ghub-slider-navigation-wrapper .ghub-slider-prev,
.ghub-query-slider .ghub-slider-container .ghub-slider-navigation-wrapper .ghub-slider-next {
margin-left: 0;
margin-right: 0;

}

}

.page-id-1186 .is-style-plus-toggle > summary {
font-size: clamp(24px, 22px + 0.65vw, 24px);
}

.badge-row-hp-cover{
z-index: 2;
position: absolute;
}

.CEO-headshot img{
object-position:top;}

.mtsnb-content{
font-family:"Lato", sans-serif;
}

.page-id-1143 ul{text-transform: none;
}

body.front-end .wfea-card .wfea-card-item{
grid-template-columns: minmax(460px, 1fr) minmax(min-content, 503px) !important;}

body.front-end .wfea-card .wfea-card-item .eaw-content-block .eaw-title{
max-width:40ch !important;}

/* Plus Toggle Style */
.is-style-plus-toggle {
    list-style: none;
    width: 100%;
font-family: "Lato";
padding: 1rem 2rem;
user-select: none;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle[open] {
padding: 1rem 2rem 4rem;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle > summary {
    list-style: none;
    position: relative;
    padding-right: 2rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    font-size: clamp(24px, 22px + 0.65vw, 32px);
    line-height: clamp(30px, 27px + 0.97vw, 42px);
    cursor: pointer;
text-transform: uppercase;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle > summary::-webkit-details-marker {
    display: none;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle > summary::after {
    content: '+';
    position: absolute;
    right: 0;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    width: 2rem;
    height: 2rem;
    font-size: 2rem;
    text-align: center;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle[open] > summary::after {
    content: '×';
}

/* Animations */
@keyframes open-details {
    0% { 
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(-10px);
    }
    100% { 
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

@keyframes close-details {
    0% { 
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
    100% { 
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(-10px);
    }
}

.is-style-plus-toggle[open] summary ~ * {
    animation: open-details 0.3s ease-in-out;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle.closing summary ~ * {
    animation: close-details 0.3s ease-in-out;
}

/* Content Styling */
.is-style-plus-toggle .details-content {
    padding: 1rem 0;
}

<style id='wp-block-template-skip-link-inline-css'>

		.skip-link.screen-reader-text {
			border: 0;
			clip-path: inset(50%);
			height: 1px;
			margin: -1px;
			overflow: hidden;
			padding: 0;
			position: absolute !important;
			width: 1px;
			word-wrap: normal !important;
		}

		.skip-link.screen-reader-text:focus {
			background-color: #eee;
			clip-path: none;
			color: #444;
			display: block;
			font-size: 1em;
			height: auto;
			left: 5px;
			line-height: normal;
			padding: 15px 23px 14px;
			text-decoration: none;
			top: 5px;
			width: auto;
			z-index: 100000;
		}
/*# sourceURL=wp-block-template-skip-link-inline-css */
</style>

<p>Addiction treatment is about more than just quitting the habit. Substance use is often linked with mental health issues like anxiety, depression, and trauma. <p>Effective recovery addresses the root causes of addiction, providing lasting, meaningful change by treating both the symptoms and underlying issues.</p>

<script id="wp-block-template-skip-link-js-after">
	( function() {
		var skipLinkTarget = document.querySelector( 'main' ),
			sibling,
			skipLinkTargetID,
			skipLink;

		// Early exit if a skip-link target can't be located.
		if ( ! skipLinkTarget ) {
			return;
		}

		/*
		 * Get the site wrapper.
		 * The skip-link will be injected in the beginning of it.
		 */
		sibling = document.querySelector( '.wp-site-blocks' );

		// Early exit if the root element was not found.
		if ( ! sibling ) {
			return;
		}

		// Get the skip-link target's ID, and generate one if it doesn't exist.
		skipLinkTargetID = skipLinkTarget.id;
		if ( ! skipLinkTargetID ) {
			skipLinkTargetID = 'wp--skip-link--target';
			skipLinkTarget.id = skipLinkTargetID;
		}

		// Create the skip link.
		skipLink = document.createElement( 'a' );
		skipLink.classList.add( 'skip-link', 'screen-reader-text' );
		skipLink.id = 'wp-skip-link';
		skipLink.href = '#' + skipLinkTargetID;
		skipLink.innerText = 'Skip to content';

		// Inject the skip link.
		sibling.parentElement.insertBefore( skipLink, sibling );
	}() );
	
//# sourceURL=wp-block-template-skip-link-js-after
</script>

Meadows Behavioral Healthcare | Addiction & Mental Health 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 Contact 
 
 

 

 

 
 

|

 928.260.3568 

 

 
 Admissions 

Admissions

From finding the right treatment program for each individual’s specific needs to paying for treatment, making the most of benefits, and explaining what to expect, our Admissions Experts have answers.

 Learn More 

 Paying for Treatment Who We Treat Length of Stay What to Bring For Families For Referring Providers 

 Inpatient 

 Outpatient 

 Workshops 

 Treatment 

Treatment

Discover the wide range of issues we address, from substance use to mental health and many points in between, as well as the methods we use to ensure not just temporary relief but lasting healing.

 Learn More 

 What We Treat 
 Emotional Trauma Drug Addiction Alcohol Addiction Dual Diagnosis Mental Health Codependency & Control Issues Depression Anxiety Bipolar Disorder PTSD Eating Disorders Sex Addiction & Intimacy Issues Military, Veteran, First Responder Co-Occurring Issues 
 How We Treat 
 Brain Center Detox Types of Therapy Our Approach to Care Military, Veteran, First Responder Specialized Care 

 About 

About Us

Learn more about what set us apart, from our Meadows Model at the heart of our comprehensive approach, to our stellar leaders, industry-leading Senior Fellows, and clinical outcomes data. 

 Learn More 

 Clinical Outcomes Leadership Senior Fellows Locations News & Media Careers 

 Resources 

Resources

Treatment is just the beginning. We also offer a wide range of resources to educate, inform, and support those in recovery, family members and loved ones, and treatment professionals looking to grow. 

 Visit Our Library 

 For Loved Ones Patient Stories Blog FAQs Alumni 

MENU

|

 Contact 

|

 928.260.3568 

 Call Now 

|

 
 

 Call Now 

 

 Admissions 

 + 
 – 
 

 Paying for Treatment Who We Treat Length of Stay What to Bring For Families For Referring Providers 

 Inpatient 

 Outpatient 

 Workshops 

 Treatment 

 + 
 – 
 

 What We Treat 
 Emotional Trauma Drug Addiction Alcohol Addiction Dual Diagnosis Mental Health Codependency & Control Issues Depression Anxiety Bipolar Disorder PTSD Eating Disorders Sex Addiction & Intimacy Issues Military, Veteran, First Responder Co-Occurring Issues 
 How We Treat 
 Brain Center Detox Types of Therapy Our Approach to Care Military, Veteran, First Responder Specialized Care 

 About 

 + 
 – 
 

 Clinical Outcomes Leadership Senior Fellows Locations News & Media Careers 

 Resources 

 + 
 – 
 

 For Loved Ones Patient Stories Blog FAQs Alumni 

 Menu 

 

 

Personalized Addiction & Mental Health Treatment for Lasting Recovery

Find hope and healing with proven treatment created for you, in collaboration with caregivers, providers, and family.

 CALL: 928.260.3568 

 

Celebrating 50 Years of Excellence in Addiction, Trauma, and Mental Health Treatment.

Building a Foundation for Lasting Change

Did you know that completing treatment significantly improves outcomes for individuals facing mental health challenges, trauma, addiction, and other behavioral health concerns? At The Meadows, 88% of inpatients complete their treatment programs, setting the foundation for lasting recovery and long-term improvements in overall health and well-being.

 

of patients complete treatment

Higher Than Vista Industry Norms

 View all Clinical Outcomes 

 

Comprehensive Treatment for Long-Term Recovery

Addiction treatment is about more than just quitting the habit. Substance use is often linked with mental health issues like anxiety, depression, and trauma. Addressing both addiction and mental health simultaneously through dual diagnosis treatment provides more complete and effective care.

Effective recovery addresses the root causes of addiction, providing lasting, meaningful change by treating both the symptoms and underlying issues.

 What We Treat 

 Trauma Drug Abuse Alcohol Addiction Dual Diagnosis Mental Health Eating Disorders Sex Addiction & Intimacy Issues 

Trusted Expertise, Measurable Success

Our treatment programs go beyond symptom management, delivering real, measurable improvements in overall quality of life. The positive changes made during treatment continue to benefit patients long after they leave. With a high overall treatment experience satisfaction rating and proven sustained progress across multiple areas of general well-being, we stand as a trusted choice for those seeking real transformation.

Life Improvements Above Industry Norms

 

92% of patients Report feeling excellent, good, or fair 1 year Post-Treatment compared to 35% at Intake.

 View All Clinical Outcomes 

 

Recovery Starts Today

 

Whether looking for addiction or mental health treatment for yourself or a loved one, we can quickly and confidentially get the process started. Call us today to reach one of our trained admissions specialists. We are here to make the entire process easier for you. 

 928.260.3568 

Our Mental Health and Addiction Treatment Programs

From inpatient care to outpatient support, workshops, and coaching, we offer industry-leading care at every stage of recovery. We support you throughout your personalized treatment journey and offer ongoing programs for alumni to ensure long-term success and foster connection.

 INPATIENT 

 OUTPATIENT 

 WORKSHOPS 

 

Introducing: Unbroken At The Meadows

For Military, Veterans, and First Responders

 Unbroken at The Meadows ™ is a specialized, evidence-based treatment program designed exclusively for active-duty military, veterans, first responders, and public safety professionals experiencing post-traumatic stress injuries and co-occurring substance use disorders. 

 Learn More 

 

 

Traveling to The Meadows for Care

Thinking about treatment away from home? Many patients find traveling to The Meadows provides the privacy, focus, and nationally recognized care needed for lasting recovery. 

 Learn More About Traveling for Care 

 

They changed my life. The Meadows Model works. The staff is amazing and the therapy is the best and most impactful I’ve ever experienced. If you’re willing to do the work, this program can change your life. 

 Curtis 

MBH Alumni

 

Treatment Locations

 ARIZONA 

 CALIFORNIA 

 COLORADO 

 GEORGIA 

 ILLINOIS 

 NEVADA 

 TEXAS 

 View All Locations 

 

If you’re ready to make change in your life, this is the place to be! I appreciated leaving the program with an understanding of my limiting thought patterns and how to redirect them mentally and somatically! I am much happier and better equipped in my life. 

 Andrea 

MBH Alumni

 

How We Treat

Our approach is centered on delivering effective, lasting results. With over 45 years of experience, we combine the proven Meadows Model with cutting-edge tools like our Brain Center and various therapies. Every treatment plan is carefully created to address the unique needs of each patient, ensuring they receive the most effective care possible for long-term recovery.

 Types of Therapy 

 

Abstinent last 30 days

one year post-treatment

 88% of reachable SUD patients at one-year post treatment reported being abstinent the last 30 days .

 View all Clinical Outcomes 

 

 
 

Featured Article

 How Does Dialectical Behavior Therapy Work in Addiction Treatment? 

Intense emotions can be difficult to manage, especially when they build quickly and lead to impulsive choices or behaviors you later regret. For those in recovery, emotional triggers often play a direct role in cravings, relapse risk, and difficulty staying present during stressful moments. Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT) was developed to help people build skills

 Learn More 

 

 

 
 
 

 

 
 
 

 

 

 
 

Resources

Looking for more? Find fresh insights from our team and senior fellows, read FAQs, learn about our Alumni program, and listen to our recovery podcasts featuring experts in behavioral healthcare.

 Learn More 

 

 

Taking the Next Step

 

Whether you’re seeking treatment for yourself or a loved one, we’re here with immediate access to the help you need. Contact us today to get started on the path to recovery.

 GET STARTED 

 CALL: 928.260.3568

Contact Us

 

 19820 N 7TH ST #205 
PHOENIX, AZ 85024 

CALL US TODAY

 928.260.3568

Our Network

 The Meadows Texas

<style id='block-visibility-screen-size-styles-inline-css'>
/* Large screens (desktops, 992px and up) */
@media ( min-width: 992px ) {
	.block-visibility-hide-large-screen {
		display: none !important;
	}
}

/* Medium screens (tablets, between 768px and 992px) */
@media ( min-width: 768px ) and ( max-width: 991.98px ) {
	.block-visibility-hide-medium-screen {
		display: none !important;
	}
}

/* Small screens (mobile devices, less than 768px) */
@media ( max-width: 767.98px ) {
	.block-visibility-hide-small-screen {
		display: none !important;
	}
}
/*# sourceURL=block-visibility-screen-size-styles-inline-css */
</style>

}

  width: 200px! important;
}

/* Custom carousel navigation button styles */
.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-prev,
.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-next {
  color: inherit;
}
.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-prev {
  left: -40px !important;
}
.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-next {
  right: -40px !important;
}

:root {
  --wp--custom--carousel-block--navigation-color: white;
}

.align-content-center{
align-content:center;}

@media (max-width: 345px) {
.footer-copyright p {
font-size:10px;
}
}

@media (max-width: 600px) {

.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-prev {
  left: -20px !important;
}
.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-next {
  right: -20px !important;
}

.ghub-query-slider .ghub-slider-container .ghub-slider-navigation-wrapper .ghub-slider-prev,
.ghub-query-slider .ghub-slider-container .ghub-slider-navigation-wrapper .ghub-slider-next {
margin-left: 0;
margin-right: 0;

}

}

.page-id-1186 .is-style-plus-toggle > summary {
font-size: clamp(24px, 22px + 0.65vw, 24px);
}

.badge-row-hp-cover{
z-index: 2;
position: absolute;
}

.CEO-headshot img{
object-position:top;}

.mtsnb-content{
font-family:"Lato", sans-serif;
}

.page-id-1143 ul{text-transform: none;
}

body.front-end .wfea-card .wfea-card-item{
grid-template-columns: minmax(460px, 1fr) minmax(min-content, 503px) !important;}

body.front-end .wfea-card .wfea-card-item .eaw-content-block .eaw-title{
max-width:40ch !important;}

/* Plus Toggle Style */
.is-style-plus-toggle {
    list-style: none;
    width: 100%;
font-family: "Lato";
padding: 1rem 2rem;
user-select: none;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle[open] {
padding: 1rem 2rem 4rem;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle > summary {
    list-style: none;
    position: relative;
    padding-right: 2rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    font-size: clamp(24px, 22px + 0.65vw, 32px);
    line-height: clamp(30px, 27px + 0.97vw, 42px);
    cursor: pointer;
text-transform: uppercase;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle > summary::-webkit-details-marker {
    display: none;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle > summary::after {
    content: '+';
    position: absolute;
    right: 0;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    width: 2rem;
    height: 2rem;
    font-size: 2rem;
    text-align: center;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle[open] > summary::after {
    content: '×';
}

/* Animations */
@keyframes open-details {
    0% { 
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(-10px);
    }
    100% { 
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

@keyframes close-details {
    0% { 
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
    100% { 
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(-10px);
    }
}

.is-style-plus-toggle[open] summary ~ * {
    animation: open-details 0.3s ease-in-out;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle.closing summary ~ * {
    animation: close-details 0.3s ease-in-out;
}

/* Content Styling */
.is-style-plus-toggle .details-content {
    padding: 1rem 0;
}

<style id='wp-block-template-skip-link-inline-css'>

		.skip-link.screen-reader-text {
			border: 0;
			clip-path: inset(50%);
			height: 1px;
			margin: -1px;
			overflow: hidden;
			padding: 0;
			position: absolute !important;
			width: 1px;
			word-wrap: normal !important;
		}

		.skip-link.screen-reader-text:focus {
			background-color: #eee;
			clip-path: none;
			color: #444;
			display: block;
			font-size: 1em;
			height: auto;
			left: 5px;
			line-height: normal;
			padding: 15px 23px 14px;
			text-decoration: none;
			top: 5px;
			width: auto;
			z-index: 100000;
		}
/*# sourceURL=wp-block-template-skip-link-inline-css */
</style>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center">Who We Are</h2>



<hr class="wp-block-separator has-text-color has-desert-color has-alpha-channel-opacity has-desert-background-color has-background is-style-narrowed"/>



<p class="has-text-align-center has-stark-color has-text-color">For over 45 years, we’ve helped people overcome addiction, heal emotional trauma, and build the skills to transform their lives. Our personalized treatment is backed by decades of experience in treating trauma, addiction, eating disorders, and mental health issues. By treating the root cause behind these issues, we provide lasting and effective care. <br></p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading wp-container-content-463bd4c8">The Meadows Model</h2>



<p class="wp-container-content-463bd4c8">The Meadows Model is our clinical foundation that addresses the root causes of trauma, developmental immaturity, and past adversity, helping individuals reconnect with their authentic selves. <script id="wp-block-template-skip-link-js-after">
	( function() {
		var skipLinkTarget = document.querySelector( 'main' ),
			sibling,
			skipLinkTargetID,
			skipLink;

		// Early exit if a skip-link target can't be located.
		if ( ! skipLinkTarget ) {
			return;
		}

		/*
		 * Get the site wrapper.
		 * The skip-link will be injected in the beginning of it.
		 */
		sibling = document.querySelector( '.wp-site-blocks' );

		// Early exit if the root element was not found.
		if ( ! sibling ) {
			return;
		}

		// Get the skip-link target's ID, and generate one if it doesn't exist.
		skipLinkTargetID = skipLinkTarget.id;
		if ( ! skipLinkTargetID ) {
			skipLinkTargetID = 'wp--skip-link--target';
			skipLinkTarget.id = skipLinkTargetID;
		}

		// Create the skip link.
		skipLink = document.createElement( 'a' );
		skipLink.classList.add( 'skip-link', 'screen-reader-text' );
		skipLink.id = 'wp-skip-link';
		skipLink.href = '#' + skipLinkTargetID;
		skipLink.innerText = 'Skip to content';

		// Inject the skip link.
		sibling.parentElement.insertBefore( skipLink, sibling );
	}() );
	
//# sourceURL=wp-block-template-skip-link-js-after
</script>

About | Meadows Behavioral Healthcare 

 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 Contact 
 
 

 

 

 
 

|

 928.260.3568 

 

 
 Admissions 

Admissions

From finding the right treatment program for each individual’s specific needs to paying for treatment, making the most of benefits, and explaining what to expect, our Admissions Experts have answers.

 Learn More 

 Paying for Treatment Who We Treat Length of Stay What to Bring For Families For Referring Providers 

 Inpatient 

 Outpatient 

 Workshops 

 Treatment 

Treatment

Discover the wide range of issues we address, from substance use to mental health and many points in between, as well as the methods we use to ensure not just temporary relief but lasting healing.

 Learn More 

 What We Treat 
 Emotional Trauma Drug Addiction Alcohol Addiction Dual Diagnosis Mental Health Codependency & Control Issues Depression Anxiety Bipolar Disorder PTSD Eating Disorders Sex Addiction & Intimacy Issues Military, Veteran, First Responder Co-Occurring Issues 
 How We Treat 
 Brain Center Detox Types of Therapy Our Approach to Care Military, Veteran, First Responder Specialized Care 

 About 

About Us

Learn more about what set us apart, from our Meadows Model at the heart of our comprehensive approach, to our stellar leaders, industry-leading Senior Fellows, and clinical outcomes data. 

 Learn More 

 Clinical Outcomes Leadership Senior Fellows Locations News & Media Careers 

 Resources 

Resources

Treatment is just the beginning. We also offer a wide range of resources to educate, inform, and support those in recovery, family members and loved ones, and treatment professionals looking to grow. 

 Visit Our Library 

 For Loved Ones Patient Stories Blog FAQs Alumni 

MENU

|

 Contact 

|

 928.260.3568 

 Call Now 

|

 
 

 Call Now 

 

 Admissions

 How We Treat 
 Brain Center Detox Types of Therapy Our Approach to Care Military, Veteran, First Responder Specialized Care 

 About

 – 
 

 Clinical Outcomes Leadership Senior Fellows Locations News & Media Careers 

 Resources 

 + 
 – 
 

 For Loved Ones Patient Stories Blog FAQs Alumni 

 Menu 

 

 

 

About

A trusted leader in recovery, helping people heal for decades.

 Get Started 

Who We Are

 

For over 45 years, we’ve helped people overcome addiction, heal emotional trauma, and build the skills to transform their lives. Our personalized treatment is backed by decades of experience in treating trauma, addiction, eating disorders, and mental health issues. By treating the root cause behind these issues, we provide lasting and effective care. 

The Meadows Approach to Care

Our approach is built on a comprehensive, integrated system supported by seven Pillars of Care: The Meadows Legacy, Senior Fellows, Healing That Fits, Comprehensive Psychiatric and Medical Care, Neuroscience Integration, Family and Community Connection, and The Meadows Model. Each pillar works together to bring the Meadows Model to life, grounding every level of care in clinical expertise, compassionate connection, and a treatment experience designed to support meaningful, lasting healing.

 Our Approach to Care 

 

 

The Meadows Model

The Meadows Model is our clinical foundation that addresses the root causes of trauma, developmental immaturity, and past adversity, helping individuals reconnect with their authentic selves. By combining evidence-based therapies with interventions that restore emotional regulation, self-worth, and healthy relationships, it guides lasting healing and recovery.

 The Meadows Model 

Proven Results and Long-Term Success

We track outcomes to ensure ongoing success and improvement. Explore the data behind our treatment programs and see the real results our patients achieve.

 See Our Outcomes 

 

Our Leadership & Expertise

 

Our leadership team includes industry leaders dedicated to quality care and innovation in mental health and recovery. Discover how their expertise shapes our programs.

 Meet our 
Leadership Team 

Industry-Leading Guidance

 

Our Senior Fellows are recognized experts who bring groundbreaking research and practice to our treatment programs. Learn how their guidance ensures the highest level of care.

 Our Senior Fellows 

 

 

Our Latest Updates

Stay current with the latest news, media coverage, and events related to our work. Explore stories and announcements that highlight our impact in the field.

 News & Media 

Make a Difference: Join Our Team

 

Join a team that’s changing lives through innovative and compassionate care. Explore career opportunities where you can make an impact in the field of recovery and mental health.

 Explore Careers 

 

Explore Our Treatment Options

 

Reach out to our admissions team today to learn more about the treatment programs available and how we can support you or your loved one.

 GET STARTED 

 CALL: 928.260.3568

<style id='block-visibility-screen-size-styles-inline-css'>
/* Large screens (desktops, 992px and up) */
@media ( min-width: 992px ) {
	.block-visibility-hide-large-screen {
		display: none !important;
	}
}

/* Medium screens (tablets, between 768px and 992px) */
@media ( min-width: 768px ) and ( max-width: 991.98px ) {
	.block-visibility-hide-medium-screen {
		display: none !important;
	}
}

/* Small screens (mobile devices, less than 768px) */
@media ( max-width: 767.98px ) {
	.block-visibility-hide-small-screen {
		display: none !important;
	}
}
/*# sourceURL=block-visibility-screen-size-styles-inline-css */
</style>

/* Custom carousel navigation button styles */
.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-prev,
.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-next {
  color: inherit;
}
.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-prev {
  left: -40px !important;
}
.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-next {
  right: -40px !important;
}

:root {
  --wp--custom--carousel-block--navigation-color: white;
}

.align-content-center{
align-content:center;}

@media (max-width: 345px) {
.footer-copyright p {
font-size:10px;
}
}

@media (max-width: 600px) {

.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-prev {
  left: -20px !important;
}
.bcbs-carousel .cb-button-next {
  right: -20px !important;
}

.ghub-query-slider .ghub-slider-container .ghub-slider-navigation-wrapper .ghub-slider-prev,
.ghub-query-slider .ghub-slider-container .ghub-slider-navigation-wrapper .ghub-slider-next {
margin-left: 0;
margin-right: 0;

}

}

.page-id-1186 .is-style-plus-toggle > summary {
font-size: clamp(24px, 22px + 0.65vw, 24px);
}

.badge-row-hp-cover{
z-index: 2;
position: absolute;
}

.CEO-headshot img{
object-position:top;}

.mtsnb-content{
font-family:"Lato", sans-serif;
}

.page-id-1143 ul{text-transform: none;
}

body.front-end .wfea-card .wfea-card-item{
grid-template-columns: minmax(460px, 1fr) minmax(min-content, 503px) !important;}

body.front-end .wfea-card .wfea-card-item .eaw-content-block .eaw-title{
max-width:40ch !important;}

/* Plus Toggle Style */
.is-style-plus-toggle {
    list-style: none;
    width: 100%;
font-family: "Lato";
padding: 1rem 2rem;
user-select: none;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle[open] {
padding: 1rem 2rem 4rem;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle > summary {
    list-style: none;
    position: relative;
    padding-right: 2rem;
    font-weight: 500;
    font-size: clamp(24px, 22px + 0.65vw, 32px);
    line-height: clamp(30px, 27px + 0.97vw, 42px);
    cursor: pointer;
text-transform: uppercase;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle > summary::-webkit-details-marker {
    display: none;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle > summary::after {
    content: '+';
    position: absolute;
    right: 0;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    width: 2rem;
    height: 2rem;
    font-size: 2rem;
    text-align: center;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle[open] > summary::after {
    content: '×';
}

/* Animations */
@keyframes open-details {
    0% { 
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(-10px);
    }
    100% { 
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

@keyframes close-details {
    0% { 
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
    100% { 
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(-10px);
    }
}

.is-style-plus-toggle[open] summary ~ * {
    animation: open-details 0.3s ease-in-out;
}

.is-style-plus-toggle.closing summary ~ * {
    animation: close-details 0.3s ease-in-out;
}

/* Content Styling */
.is-style-plus-toggle .details-content {
    padding: 1rem 0;
}

<style id='wp-block-template-skip-link-inline-css'>

		.skip-link.screen-reader-text {
			border: 0;
			clip-path: inset(50%);
			height: 1px;
			margin: -1px;
			overflow: hidden;
			padding: 0;
			position: absolute !important;
			width: 1px;
			word-wrap: normal !important;
		}

		.skip-link.screen-reader-text:focus {
			background-color: #eee;
			clip-path: none;
			color: #444;
			display: block;
			font-size: 1em;
			height: auto;
			left: 5px;
			line-height: normal;
			padding: 15px 23px 14px;
			text-decoration: none;
			top: 5px;
			width: auto;
			z-index: 100000;
		}
/*# sourceURL=wp-block-template-skip-link-inline-css */
</style>

<p class="has-text-align-left has-stark-color has-text-color">Our rehab admissions process is designed to ease the stress of seeking help. From the first interaction, our team leads patients to a path of recovery as quickly as possible.</p>

<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Rehab Admissions Process Overview</h3>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li style="font-style:normal;font-weight:300;text-transform:none"><strong>Initial Contact</strong>: Reach out via phone or online inquiry.</li>



<li style="font-style:normal;font-weight:300;text-transform:none"><strong>Screening Process</strong>: Conduct a comprehensive evaluation of the patient’s needs.</li>



<li style="font-style:normal;font-weight:300;text-transform:none"><strong>Insurance Verification</strong>: Confirm insurance coverage and discuss payment options.</li>



<li style="font-style:normal;font-weight:300;text-transform:none"><strong>Personalized Treatment Plan</strong>: Develop a customized care plan based on the assessment.</li>



<li style="font-style:normal;font-weight:300;text-transform:none"><strong>Admission Scheduling</strong>: Set a date and time for the patient to enter the program.</li>



<li style="font-style:normal;font-weight:300;text-transform:none"><strong>Arrival and Orientation</strong>: Welcome the patient, provide an orientation to the facility, and begin the treatment program.</li>
</ul>

<script id="wp-block-template-skip-link-js-after">
	( function() {
		var skipLinkTarget = document.querySelector( 'main' ),
			sibling,
			skipLinkTargetID,
			skipLink;

		// Early exit if a skip-link target can't be located.
		if ( ! skipLinkTarget ) {
			return;
		}

		/*
		 * Get the site wrapper.
		 * The skip-link will be injected in the beginning of it.
		 */
		sibling = document.querySelector( '.wp-site-blocks' );

		// Early exit if the root element was not found.
		if ( ! sibling ) {
			return;
		}

		// Get the skip-link target's ID, and generate one if it doesn't exist.
		skipLinkTargetID = skipLinkTarget.id;
		if ( ! skipLinkTargetID ) {
			skipLinkTargetID = 'wp--skip-link--target';
			skipLinkTarget.id = skipLinkTargetID;
		}

		// Create the skip link.
		skipLink = document.createElement( 'a' );
		skipLink.classList.add( 'skip-link', 'screen-reader-text' );
		skipLink.id = 'wp-skip-link';
		skipLink.href = '#' + skipLinkTargetID;
		skipLink.innerText = 'Skip to content';

		// Inject the skip link.
		sibling.parentElement.insertBefore( skipLink, sibling );
	}() );
	
//# sourceURL=wp-block-template-skip-link-js-after
</script>

Our Admissions Process | Meadows Behavioral Healthcare

 928.260.3568 

 

 
 Admissions 

Admissions

From finding the right treatment program for each individual’s specific needs to paying for treatment, making the most of benefits, and explaining what to expect, our Admissions Experts have answers.

Discover the wide range of issues we address, from substance use to mental health and many points in between, as well as the methods we use to ensure not just temporary relief but lasting healing.

Learn more about what set us apart, from our Meadows Model at the heart of our comprehensive approach, to our stellar leaders, industry-leading Senior Fellows, and clinical outcomes data.

Resources

Treatment is just the beginning. We also offer a wide range of resources to educate, inform, and support those in recovery, family members and loved ones, and treatment professionals looking to grow.

Personalized Care for Lasting Recovery

Our personalized, evidence-based treatment meets patients’ needs for effective, lasting recovery. Here, recovery isn’t just possible — it’s proven.

 Get STarted 

Simple and Supportive Admissions Process

 

Our rehab admissions process is designed to ease the stress of seeking help. From the first interaction, our team leads patients to a path of recovery as quickly as possible.

Rehab Admissions Process Overview

 

 Initial Contact : Reach out via phone or online inquiry.

 Screening Process : Conduct a comprehensive evaluation of the patient’s needs.

 Insurance Verification : Confirm insurance coverage and discuss payment options.

 Personalized Treatment Plan : Develop a customized care plan based on the assessment.

 Admission Scheduling : Set a date and time for the patient to enter the program.

 Arrival and Orientation : Welcome the patient, provide an orientation to the facility, and begin the treatment program.

 

 

Taking the First Steps

It all begins with an easy conversation. We’ll make sure you feel comfortable and provide clear guidance on what comes next.

 

 Get in Touch: Give us a call or fill out a brief contact form so we can reach out.

 Quick, Simple Conversation: We’ll have a quick chat to learn more about your situation and how we can help.

 What Happens Next: After our conversation, we’ll take care of the details and reach out to you with the next steps.

 

 Call: 928.260.3568 

Effective Recovery for Every Individual

Patients at The Meadows stick with their treatment because it works. Our treatment programs empower patients, driving real change and lasting recovery. 

1 Year Post Treatment

 

 

 92% of patients Report feeling excellent, good, or fair compared to 35% at Intake.

 88% Inpatient completion rate*

 

* Higher than vista industry norms 

 who we treat 

 

 

They changed my life. Now I have a career helping people who struggle with mental health and addiction as I did.

 Thomas 

MBH Alumni

Affordable and Flexible Payment Options

 

We believe quality care should be accessible to everyone. The Meadows works with major insurance providers, including Cigna, UnitedHealthcare, and TRICARE along with many others. Our team will work with you to verify insurance coverage quickly and determine next steps.

Final payment is determined by the insurance carrier. If insurance doesn’t cover the treatment, financing options are available, including payment plans and CareCredit.

 paying for treatment 

 

How Long Does Rehab Last?

Your treatment duration depends on your personal needs and goals. For example, the drug rehab process may differ from other types of treatment. We offer inpatient programs ranging from 30 to 45 days, as well as personalized plans that adapt to your progress. Outpatient programs typically begin at 8 weeks. 

Learn more about how we tailor the length of stay to best support your recovery journey.

 Length of Stay 

Preparing for Your Stay

Start your recovery journey feeling prepared with helpful guidance on what to pack. Following these guidelines helps us maintain a positive, safe space for all.

 What to Bring 

 

 

Traveling to The Meadows for Care

Traveling for treatment is easier than you think. Our admissions team assists with travel logistics, family coordination, and insurance coverage, so you can focus fully on starting your healing journey. 

 Learn how we help make traveling for care easy 

Find the Right Path to Support

For Families

Supporting a loved one through mental health or addiction can be overwhelming. We’re here to guide you through treatment options and provide the resources you need.

 for families 

For Referring Professionals

Need to refer a client for higher care? Our programs offer specialized support for mental health and addiction recovery, working closely with therapists and healthcare professionals.

 for referring professionals 

Proven Care for Long-Term Success

 

Our scientifically proven methods meet each patient where they are. We aim to understand precisely what they’ll face outside of treatment and provide the most effective care possible. Patients leave our care with the tools to maintain recovery in the face of uncertainty. 

 explore treatment options 

 

Incredible program, location, and staff who are caring individuals that are more than qualified in their care of others. As a professional in this field, I was blown away by the services offered here to not only their clients, but their families as well.

 Joshua B. 

Referring Provider

 

Take the First Step Toward Real Change

 

The right support can make all the difference. Let us guide you or your loved one to a healthier, more stable future. Speak with an admissions specialist today.

 Recovery Begins Here
